---
name: Lab Idea
about: Propose a new broken lab scenario
title: '[LAB IDEA] '
labels: lab-idea
assignees: ''
---

## Scenario Description
Provide a detailed description of the scenario. What service is broken? What is the symptoms?

## Root Cause
What is the actual underlying issue that the user needs to find and fix?

## Setup Instructions
How should this lab be built? (e.g. what packages to install, what config files to modify).

## Expected Resolution Steps
How would a user solve this? List the commands or actions needed. Note that when implementing this lab, a `solution.sh` must be provided to automate these steps for CI testing.
